title: Active Travel Fund tranche 2: stage 2 process evaluation
body: "The Department for Transport awarded funding to local authorities to produce walking and cycling facilities via the Active Travel Fund (ATF), with tranche 1 funding allocated in 2020 and tranche 2 funding allocated in 2021.  The report explores local authority officers’ views, perceptions and experiences of how ATF-funded schemes have worked in their area, including:   scheme implementation scheme level monitoring and evaluation experiences of engagement how scheme characteristics affect success processes of funding active travel   This report is part of the second stage of the ATF process evaluation, which was conducted as part of a wider evaluation of the ATF. It provides a summary of the stage 2 findings from the process evaluation, with feedback from 28 funded authorities across England through 4 focus groups.  Related content   Active Travel Fund tranche 2: evaluation baseline Active Travel Fund tranche 2: stage 1 process evaluation Active Travel Fund tranche 2: government response and peer review   "
